comment: Exact pre-renewal flat and rate bonuses from every SC_* in battle_calc_weapon_attack after battle_addmastery (mastery-fix phase). Full exploration of the mechanic as requested – every relevant SC included with verbatim numbers, exclusions, conditions and val usage. No renewal content. All values taken directly from the source.

SC_AURABLADE.hercules_ref: if (sc && sc->data[SC_AURABLADE] && skill_id != LK_SPIRALPIERCE && skill_id != ML_SPIRALPIERCE) { int lv = sc->data[SC_AURABLADE]->val1; ATK_ADD(wd.damage, wd.damage2, 20 * lv); }
